---
name: release-note-cleaner
description: Normalize one existing release-note entry for consistent headings and links. Use when the user asks to clean a release note without changing its facts.
---

# Release Note Cleaner

Read the named entry and preserve every version, date, issue link, contributor, and behavior claim.
Normalize its heading level and link formatting to match adjacent entries.

**Done when:** the entry matches the local format and a diff confirms that its facts and links are
unchanged.
